name: Smoked Tomato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large stockpot over medium heat. Add bacon and cook until brown and crispy.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté until aromas are released.
3. Pour in red wine and boil for 3-4 minutes until reduced by half.
4. Stir in tomatoes, chicken stock, and cook until the liquid reduces by about one-fourth, 10-15 minutes.
5. Mix in tomato paste, cayenne pepper sauce, and thyme. Puree with a hand blender or food processor, then return to pan if needed.
6. Season with salt and pepper. Serve hot.
